query:
INSERT INTO secure_documents (ownerId, title, description, documentType, content, status, accessLevel, version, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 1, document_name, description, document_type, '', 'final', 'owner_only', 1, created_at, updated_at
FROM vault_documents
WHERE document_name NOT IN (SELECT title FROM secure_documents)
